sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f derived from market system performance metrics using GHPR efficient frontier approach (equations 7.06a-7.06d). HPR calculated as (Starting Capital + Profit) / Starting Capital. Example: $2,000 optimal f generating $100 profit yields HPR of 1.05. Apply with leverage and profit reinvestment for geometric growth. Specific base_risk_pct not provided in excerpt—requires calculation from system performance data.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f with leverage and reinvesting profits to achieve greatest geometric growth, calculated using the GHPR efficient frontier approach with equations 7.06a through 7.06d.
